languages.text: "Вам стоит благодарить медикариев из Сектора Бионика, а не меня".

traits.locale_text: "Вам стоит благодарить медикариев из Сектора Бионика, а не меня".

languages.text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."
languages.original_text: "Вам стоит благодарить медикариев из Сектора Бионика, а не меня".

traits.locale_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."
"You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."
"You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

languages.text: 「感謝の意はセクター・ビオニカの医療隊に示すべきだ。私ではなく」
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

languages.text: "Bana değil, Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarına teşekkür et."
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

traits.locale_text: "Bana değil, Sektör Biyonika'daki sıhhiye subaylarına teşekkür et."

languages.text: “你们该感谢的是仿生区的医务官们，不是我。”
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

traits.locale_text: “你们该感谢的是仿生区的医务官们，不是我。”

languages.text: "Ihr solltet den Medicae-Offizieren in Sektor Bionica danken, nicht mir."
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr solltet den Medicae-Offizieren in Sektor Bionica danken, nicht mir."

languages.text: « Ce sont les officiers de medicae que vous devriez remercier, pas moi. »
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

traits.locale_text: « Ce sont les officiers de medicae que vous devriez remercier, pas moi. »

languages.text: «Debería darles las gracias a los oficiales de medicae del Sector Bionica, no a mí».
languages.original_text: "You ought to thank the medicae officers in the Sector Bionica, not me."

traits.locale_text: «Debería darles las gracias a los oficiales de medicae del Sector Bionica, no a mí».
